entity.summary: Mantle ecosystem decentralized exchange candidate identified in the HEI verified-unadded backlog from CoinPaprika and CoinGecko source data and currently treated as an active DEX record.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded backlog rows hei_unadded_0043 and hei_unadded_0044. Source evidence is limited to CoinPaprika and CoinGecko database references plus the official domain, so this record should be improved later if stronger official-history evidence is found.

events.title: Agni Finance present in exchange source data
events.description: Agni Finance appeared in the verified-unadded candidate generator from CoinPaprika and CoinGecko source data as an exchange-like DEX candidate not found in current HEI records.
events.notes: This is a database-reference event, not a verified launch event. Replace with a proper launch/history event if stronger sources are added.

evidence.title: Agni Finance official website
evidence.notes: Official domain used to preserve the active Agni Finance identity.

evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0043.
